strengths: Clean pure-function module with no external dependencies — strict separation of concerns
Derive-filename fallback chain (H1 → intent → default) is well-structured and handles edge cases
Handoff footer stripping uses regex-based approach that handles both full footer and bare HR
Substring-trap guard on parseQaVerdict works correctly — anchored regex prevents false positives on sentences like 'the document passes'
Never-returns-empty guard in extractRevisedDocument correctly falls back to original trimmed input
slugify caps at 80 chars before trimming hyphens, avoiding mid-word trailing-hyphen artifacts
Test coverage is thorough: all DELIVERABLE scenarios plus additional edge cases (80-char cap, positive byte cap)
Follows existing codebase convention: tabs, double quotes, named exports, colocated test file
